query: SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, o.orderNumber, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.size, oi.lineTotal FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.orderNumber IN ('00030', '00029') ORDER BY o.orderNumber DESC, oi.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT oi.id, oi.orderId, o.orderNumber, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.size, oi.lineTotal FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o ON oi.orderId = o.id WHERE o.orderNumber IN ('00030', '00029') ORDER BY o.orderNumber DESC, oi.id;
